# PERF-055 positive: bufio.NewScanner without explicit Buffer sizing
lang: go
file: PERF-055-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bufio"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func ScanLines(c *gin.Context) {
	body := c.Request.Body
	defer body.Close()
	scanner := bufio.NewScanner(body)
	for scanner.Scan() {
		line := scanner.Text()
		_ = line
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
